creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT-FIX-NO MAINTAINER : graphics/imanager

According to :

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/ports@freebsd.org.html

the port graphics/imanager has an unfetchable distfile.  After doing some
looking around I found another site that has it.  I also noticed that there
was to MAINTAINER listed in the Makefile.  The patch below addresses both
of these issues.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN imanager imanager.new
From : /usr/ports/graphics
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/imanager.diff
--------------------------------------------------------------------
